summary: Comprehensive testing of the new Badge System and Audit Flow features. Tested: 1) Badge calculation logic (starter/bronze/silver/gold), 2) Dashboard API with badge_progress, 3) Audit submission API, 4) Web audit form page, 5) Badge display on auditor dashboard. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 with invalid ObjectId format (e.g., 'invalid' string). Should return 422 for validation error.

critical_code_review_comments: Badge system properly calculates levels: starter(1+), bronze(10+), silver(50+), gold(100+)
Dashboard API correctly returns badge, badge_label, and badge_progress with next_badge, audits_needed, progress_percent
Push notification logic is present in push_notifications.py with notify_audit_completed function (MOCKED - no real device tokens)
Audit form page has all required fields with proper validation
UI shows badge progress card with emoji and progress bar

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All badge and audit form flows working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing auditor with 1 audit (starter badge)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badge system verified working: Current auditor (Kouassi Jean-Marc) has 1 audit = starter badge. Badge progress shows 9 audits needed for Bronze. Mission COOP-GAGNOA has 5 parcels (1 audited, 4 pending). Audit form accessible via /auditor/audit/{missionId}/{parcelId}. Push notifications are MOCKED (no real device tokens in test environment).

features_verified.Badge Progress Calculation: PASS - Returns current_badge, next_badge, audits_needed, progress_percent
features_verified.Audit Submission API: PASS - Endpoint exists and accepts valid submissions
features_verified.Badge Display on Dashboard: PASS - Shows 🌱 Débutant badge with progress bar
features_verified.Push Notification Trigger: MOCKED - Logic present but no real device tokens
features_verified.Mission Parcels List: PASS - Shows 5 parcels with status (1 approved, 4 pending)

mocked_apis_confirmed: Push notifications - notify_audit_completed function exists but requires real device tokens to send
notify_new_badge_earned function exists for badge notifications
